transcript: Speaker A: Hello. Speaker B: Hello. Speaker A: उम आता काय बोलायचं? [Um, what to say now?] Speaker B: मला पण तेच कळत नाहीये. [I also don't understand that.] Speaker A: How are you, Neha? Speaker B: उम आय एम... छान आहे मी. [Um, I am... I am good.] Speaker A: तसं नाही, असं बोल, "I am good". [Not like that, say it like this, "I am good".] Speaker B: Okay, I am good. Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोकं स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतायत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on MySivi app. You also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Neha. Devesh. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. Mute. Speaker. End. Start English Learning -MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad showcases a simulated peer-to-peer English practice call on the MySivi app, where one user helps correct another's grammar. It highlights the app's large user base and promotes a limited-time trial offer for just 1 rupee.
